data.description: USTR GREER: STRESSED THE IMPORTANCE OF AGRICULTURAL ACCESS FOR THE US TO CHINA'S HE LIFENG, AND PROPOSED THE ESTABLISHMENT OF A US–CHINA BOARD OF TRADE.

data.title: TMO Labs Integrates with Sei Network to Bring Blockchain into Everyday Payments in Korea
data.description: On April 30, 2026, in New York, the Sei Development Foundation revealed that TMO Labs, a Web3 fintech firm, is set to merge with Sei Network, a robust Layer-1 blockchain. This partnership targets the infusion of blockchain technology into daily life in Korea, emphasizing accessibility and innovation. This initiative underscores the importance of leveraging cutting-edge technology in upcoming projects, with significant implications for Korea's financial sector and broader society.

data.title: Euro Tech Holdings Company Limited Reports 2025 Year-End Results
data.description: In Hong Kong on April 30, 2026, Euro Tech Holdings Company Limited (Nasdaq: CLWT) disclosed its financial performance for the year ending December 31, 2025. During Fiscal 2025, the company achieved a net income of US$157,000, a decrease from the previous fiscal year's US$734,000.

data.title: Gran Tierra Energy Inc. Provides Release Date for its 2026 First Quarter Results and Details of Annual Meeting of Stockholders
data.description: Gran Tierra Energy Inc., a leading energy company, is set to reveal its financial and operational performance for the first quarter of 2026 on Thursday, May 7, 2026, after the market closes. Investors and analysts can anticipate the release of key figures and insights that reflect the Company's progress. Following this disclosure, Gran Tierra will hold a conference call on Friday, May 8, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. MT and 11:00 a.m. ET, where specific details and strategies will likely be discussed. This event is expected to provide valuable information for stakeholders and the public regarding Gran Tierra's standing and future endeavors.

data.title: Goldsky Resources Files Audited Annual Financial Statements for the Year Ended December 31, 2025
data.description: Goldsky Resources Corp, based in Vancouver, BC, has disclosed that it submitted its audited consolidated financial statements and management's discussion and analysis for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2025. Trading on the TSXV under the ticker symbol GSKR, and also listed on FNSE as GSKR SDB, OTCQX as GSKRF, and FRA as HEG0, the company made this announcement. Interested individuals can access the detailed audited financial statements and MD&A through SEDAR+ and the company's official website. For more in-depth information, the complete news piece is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Amgen/
data.description: In the latest update, Amgen has disclosed their financial results for the first quarter of 2026. The news was released on 30th April 2026. Following adjustments made by the company, the corrected report provides essential insights. Amgen's performance in the first quarter of 2026 is detailed, including significant figures and additional information shared at the conclusion of the release.

data.title: Mineros S.A.’s Special Meeting of Shareholders Concluded Without Conducting Business
data.description: Medellín, Colombia--Mineros S.A. (TSX:MSA, OTCQX:MNSAF, BVC:MINEROS) disclosed that during a recently held special shareholder assembly, no agenda items were presented for approval, resulting in no transactions taking place. The meeting, mandated by Colombian regulations and corporate statutes, was convened in February as a precautionary measure. The event had no business conducted, marking a procedural fulfillment within specified legal constraints for the company.

data.title: Hemab Therapeutics Announces Pricing of Upsized Initial Public Offering
data.description: On April 30, 2026, Hemab Therapeutics Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: COAG), based in Cambridge, Mass. and Copenhagen, Denmark, revealed the pricing of its initial public offering. The clinical-stage biotechnology company is focused on developing innovative therapies for blood coagulation disorders. They are offering 16,750,000 shares of common stock at $18.00 per share, aiming to raise significant funds. Moreover, Hemab has granted underwriters a 30-day option to acquire up to 2,512,500 additional shares at the same price. All shares in this offering come directly from Hemab, showing the company's commitment to expanding its operations.

data.title: Rick Kimbrell of StartKleen named Entrepreneur Of The Year® 2026 Southwest finalist by EY US
data.description: EY US is honoring visionary entrepreneurs who are driving the evolution of the business landscape in Gunter, Texas. Rick Kimbrell, the Founder and CEO of StartKleen, has been recognized as a top contender for the prestigious Entrepreneur Of The Year 2026 Southwest Award by Ernst & Young LLP (EY US). This year marks the 41st anniversary of the award, highlighting extraordinary individuals like Kimbrell who are leading innovation and growth. The accolade underscores Kimbrell's outstanding contributions to his company and the broader entrepreneurial community.
NEW ZEALAND BUILDING CONSENTS FELL 1.3%, FOLLOWING A 2.7% RISE IN THE PRIOR PERIOD.

data.title: TransAlta Corporation Announces Results of the 2026 Annual and Special Meeting of Shareholders and Election of all Directors
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta, on April 30, 2026, TransAlta Corporation (TSX: TA) (NYSE: TAC) conducted its Annual and Special Meeting of Shareholders. According to reports, the meeting saw a significant turnout with a total of 188,939,751 common shares represented by shareholders attending in person and by proxy. This figure accounted for approximately 63.55% of the company's total outstanding common shares.

data.title: TEAMSTERS CALIFORNIA CONDEMN RUSHED, RECKLESS DMV RULES ALLOWING DRIVERLESS TRUCKS
data.description: A statement from Teamsters California Co-Chairs Victor Mineros and Peter Finn addresses their commitment to advocating for quality employment opportunities and road safety. Released in Sacramento, Calif., on April 30, 2026, they discuss the recent regulations introduced by the California Department of Motor Vehicles (DMV) concerning heavy vehicles. The union asserts its dedication to fighting for fair wages and improved working conditions, emphasizing the importance of upholding safety standards on the roads in light of these new rules.

data.title: NOVONIX Divests Non-Core Business to Focus on Synthetic Graphite
data.description: NOVONIX has completed the sale of its NOVONIX Battery Technology Solutions Inc. division in Canada to its previous CEO as previously disclosed.

data.title: Jura Announces Adoption of Semi-Annual Reporting
data.description: Jura Energy Corporation, based in Calgary, Alberta, announced on April 30, 2026, its plans to implement the semi-annual reporting (SAR) pilot program. The company, referred to as Jura, intends to adopt the policies of this program while utilizing the exemptions offered under Coordinated Blanket Order 51-933, which allows for Semi-Annual Reporting for Certain Venture Issuers. This decision indicates a strategic move by Jura to enhance its reporting practices and align with regulatory requirements.
QANTAS WILL SUSPEND ITS SYDNEY–BENGALURU SERVICE FROM AUGUST, WITH OPERATIONS SET TO RESUME AT THE END OF OCTOBER.

QANTAS WILL CONTINUE TO REDEPLOY AIRCRAFT TO OPERATE ADDITIONAL FLIGHTS BETWEEN AUSTRALIA AND EUROPE — ADDING 2,000 WEEKLY SEATS — AND HAS EXTENDED ITS PERTH–ROME SERVICE THROUGH THE END OF OCTOBER, WHILE PARIS FLIGHTS WILL REVERT TO THREE RETURN SERVICES PER WEEK IN AUGUST.

QANTAS AND JETSTAR ARE EXTENDING THEIR SCHEDULE CHANGES INTO Q1 FY27, KEEPING THE GROUP'S 5 PERCENTAGE POINT CAPACITY REDUCTION IN PLACE THROUGH THE END OF SEPTEMBER, WITH INTERNATIONAL CAPACITY CUT BY A FURTHER 2 PERCENTAGE POINTS FOR Q1 FY27.

data.title: Atlantic Petroleum Posts Net Loss of DKK 3.8MM for 2025
data.description: On April 30, 2026, in Tórshavn, Faroe Islands, P/F Atlantic Petroleum (NASDAQ OMX: ATLA DKK) released its Annual Results for the year 2025. It is important to review this company announcement alongside Atlantic Petroleum’s Consolidated Annual Report to gain a comprehensive understanding of the financial performance.

data.title: Community Healthcare Trust Incorporated Announces Increased First Quarter Dividend
data.description: Today, Community Healthcare Trust Incorporated (NYSE: CHCT) revealed an update regarding its common stock cash dividend for the quarter concluding on March 31, 2026. The Board of Directors has approved an increase in the dividend payment to $0.48 per share. Shareholders are set to receive this payment in the upcoming period.

data.title: FIRSTFUND REPORTS 2025 FOURTH QUARTER RESULTS
data.description: Consolidated Firstfund Capital Corp. (TSXV: FFP) reported its financial results for the three months ending December 31, 2025, showing a net loss of $4,231 or $0.00 per share. This is an improvement from the same period in 2024, which saw a net loss of $72,015 or $0.01 per share. The company also recorded an unrealized net gain of $5,000 for the same period in 2025, compared to an unrealized net loss of $108,130 in 2024. This gain was from the revaluation of investments in Vitality Products Inc. (TSXV: VPI) measured at fair value through profit or loss. Fee income decreased slightly to $104,938 for the three months ending December 31, 2025, down from $105,228 in 2024. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.
